# HouseMove

> Professional moving services in the UK — request a move, connect with vetted moving companies, and get quotes in minutes for domestic, commercial, and international relocations. Free for customers and free for movers.

Customers submit a free move request with pickup and delivery addresses, and matched companies in the area respond with quotes.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Overview of HouseMove and starting point to request a move.
- [Request a Move](/request-move?step=1): Multi-step form to submit a new move request (move type, addresses, property size, contact details).
- [Contact](/contact): Email (help@housemove.co) and support hours.
- [Privacy Policy](/privacy-policy): How HouseMove collects and uses personal data.
- [Terms and Conditions](/terms-and-conditions): Terms of use for the HouseMove service.
- [For AI Agents](/agents): MCP endpoint for AI agents.
